geopolitics.notes: Energy shocks and risk-off sentiment affect crypto and commodities

energy.notes: Oil/gas moves affect risk sentiment; BTC mining costs tied to energy

etf.notes: ETF approvals or rejections most directly affect BTC and ETH

macro.notes: Macro events affect DXY, bonds, equities, and by extension crypto

inflation.notes: High inflation is bullish for hard assets like gold and BTC

regulation.notes: Regulatory news broadly affects crypto; equities for listed companies

hack.notes: Major hacks create selling pressure; affected protocol tokens drop most

institutional.notes: Institutional adoption most directly benefits BTC/ETH

mining.notes: Mining news directly affects BTC and mining equities

stablecoin.notes: Stablecoin depegs trigger broad crypto selling

defi.notes: DeFi ecosystem news primarily impacts ETH and DeFi tokens

nft.notes: NFT activity is mostly on Ethereum and Solana

ai.notes: AI narrative drives AI-themed tokens and broadly benefits crypto

exchange.notes: Exchange-related news most directly affects exchange tokens like BNB
